We make international travel safe and easy for both governments and citizens

Applying for a visa?

CLICK HERE

What We Do

At visapwr, we manage visa and consular services for government clients around the world. We concentrate on providing the administrative aspects of the visa process via a global network of Visa Application Centres, allowing our government clients to focus on their core decision-making role.  

Learn more about us

Present in 90 countries

worldwide

Over 150 visa application centres

on behalf of government clients

Millions of visa applications

per year

OUR GOVERNMENT CLIENTS

UK

Belgium

Cyprus

France

Germany

Hungary

Italy

Poland

Portugal

Switzerland

The Netherlands

Israel

OUR CSR VISION

OUR INSIGHTS

Combining technology with the human touch, we aim to make a positive social and environmental contribution in all the countries where we operate. We want to be a preferred employer, a trusted partner for governments and a force for good in the communities around our centres, supporting their development and initiatives to protect the environment.

Learn more

The visa sector is transforming, as processes become more digitalised, and governments need more than ever to balance security considerations with higher customer expectations. In our Insights section, visapwr experts share their perspectives on some of the key priorities for the sector, such as customer experience, digital transformation, cyber security or managing change.

Discover our articles

Our purpose

By combining technical know-how with the human touch, we help to ensure safe and easy travel for both governments and citizens.  

We work with our government clients as they welcome people from around the world, travelling abroad to share experiences, discover new cultures, work and learn.
